blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDWolframRepresentation["ID4368", 1, <|"kind" -> "symbolic_token_index", "title" -> "Clog Error Url Vi Relation", "latex" -> "$c.log(Error(\"W`\"+a+\"`\"+b),{url:c})},Vi=function(a,b){if(Xi){const c=_.ze(\"SCRIPT\");c.async=!0;c.type=\"text/javascript\";c.charset=\"UTF-8\";c.src=_.de(Xi);_.Qi(c);c.onerror=_.Ob(Wi,a,b,c.src);_.Ui(\"HEAD\")[0].appendChild(c)}},Yi=class extends _.M{constructor(a){super(a)}};var Zi=_.B(_.kd,Yi,17)||new Yi,$", "numericAtoms" -> {0, 8, 17}, "symbolicTokens" -> {"c", "log", "Error", "W", "a", "b", "url", "Vi", "function", "if", "Xi", "const", "ze", "SCRIPT", "async", "type", "javascript", "charset", "UTF", "src", "de", "Qi", "onerror", "Ob", "Wi", "Ui", "HEAD", "appendChild", "Yi", "class", "extends", "M", "constructor", "super", "var", "Zi", "B", "kd", "new"}, "candidateWolframInput" -> "", "candidateMethod" -> "tuple_notation_requires_semantic_translation"|>]]
